message:
refactor(error-handling): replace panics with structured errors in CPU backend and interpreter

Replace debug_assert/expect/assert calls with proper error propagation:

- executor.rs: Replace debug_assert_eq + expect in evaluate_equation with
  UnexpectedOutputArity and InvariantViolation error returns. Replace
  expect in evaluate_jaxpr_parallel_inner scheduler loop with
  InvariantViolation error. Add try_with_device_count that returns
  BackendError::InvalidConfiguration instead of panicking, and make
  with_device_count fall back to default on invalid input. Simplify
  registry_resolve_unavailable_backend test with matches! macro.

- lib.rs (fj-interpreters): Add InvariantViolation variant to
  InterpreterError with Display impl and corresponding test coverage.

- backend.rs (fj-runtime): Add InvalidConfiguration variant to
  BackendError with Display impl and test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
